children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, generate unique patient_id
children.behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present and non-empty; generate a new patient_id; store patient data in patients database; return success with patient_id

global_vars.description: Write new patient record to patients database

constraints.description: Required fields (name, dob, contact, insurance) must be non-empty

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created with unique patient_id

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
children.behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients; check doctor_id and appointment_time are not in the past and slot is free; create appointment record in appointments database; return success with appointment_id

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence
Read to check availability, write to create appointment

data_operations.description: Check doctor availability for requested time

constraints.description: Appointment time must not be in the past
Doctor must be available at requested time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record is created with unique appointment_id

children.name: RetrieveMedicalRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
children.behavior: Query records database for all records with given patient_id; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

global_vars.description: Read medical records for the patient

data_operations.description: Query records by patient_id and sort by timestamp

constraints.description: Records must be returned sorted by date descending

acceptance_criteria.description: All records for patient_id are returned in correct order

children.name: UpdatePatientProfile
children.purpose: Update patient profile fields; validate insurance against external system if changed
children.behavior: Check patient_id exists; update provided fields in patients database; if insurance field is present and changed, validate against external system before saving; return success with updated data

global_vars.description: Read current patient data, write updated fields

constraints.description: Insurance must be validated against external system if changed

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is updated with validated insurance

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: patients (read_write) covered by RegisterPatient (write), BookAppointment (read), UpdatePatientProfile (read_write). appointments (read_write) covered by BookAppointment (read_write). records (read_write) covered by RetrieveMedicalRecords (read). Write on records is not required by any child; parent must ensure records are written elsewhere or this is a gap. All other parent operations are fully distributed.
